differentials.name: ROUND SOLID MASS ◊  Benign primary tumors >> malignant primary tumors ◊  Secondary neoplasms are more frequent than primary ◊  Cystic tumors are more common than solid tumors!
differentials.raw: ROUND SOLID MASS ◊  Benign primary tumors >> malignant primary tumors ◊  Secondary neoplasms are more frequent than primary ◊  Cystic tumors are more common than solid tumors!

differentials.name: Metastases: especially ← colon, ovary
differentials.raw: Metastases: especially ← colon, ovary (most frequent neoplasm of mesentery)

differentials.name: Desmoplastic small round cell tumor of peritoneum
differentials.raw: Desmoplastic small round cell tumor of peritoneum

context: ◊  Malignant solid tumors have a tendency to be located near root of mesentery, benign solid tumors in periphery near bowel!
